# Gimakx

> Gimakx is an elite B2B manufacturer of custom Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu (BJJ) Gis, rash guards, and academy apparel. We handle full in-house production — from cutting to final stitching and quality checks — using premium pre-shrunk pearl weave cotton and 100% pure cotton in three fabric weights (380, 450, and 500 gsm). We serve academies, gyms, retailers, and apparel brands worldwide with custom branding, private labeling, and low minimum order quantities (10 units per design).

## Key Facts

- Business type: B2B manufacturer (no individual consumer orders)
- Minimum order quantity (MOQ): 10 units per design
- BJJ Gi fabric weights: 380 gsm (GiPro Aerotough), 450 gsm (GiPro Fortitude), 500 gsm (GiPro Monolith)
- Rash guard fabric: 240 gsm moisture-wicking, anti-bacterial, stretchable (Evosoft)
- IBJJF-approved standard cuts and fabrics
- Sizes: full range M0 to A5, including youth and women's sizes
- Colors: 12+ colors available across all three fabric weights
- Customization: embroidery, woven patches, sublimation, custom neck labels, branded packaging
- Lead times: GiPro Custom Series 3–4 weeks; GiPro Standard Series ships within a few days
- Payment methods: Bank Transfer (TT), Western Union, Payoneer
- Location: Pakistan
- Contact: support@gimakx.com | WhatsApp +92 (310) 7197-037

## Products

- [BJJ Gi (GiPro Series)](https://www.gimakx.com/bjj-gi.html): Custom Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu Gis in 380, 450, and 500 gsm pre-shrunk pearl weave. Triple-stitched stress points, IBJJF-approved, full academy customization.
- [Evosoft Rash Guards](https://www.gimakx.com/evosoft.html): Fully sublimated 240 gsm rash guards for No-Gi and under-Gi training. Custom academy logos, sponsors, and color themes.
- [Apparels](https://www.gimakx.com/apparels.html): Academy apparel including GiStrix T-shirts and GiFlex hoodies with custom branding.
- [Accessories](https://www.gimakx.com/accessories.html): Custom badges, belts, Gi bags, caps, and other academy accessories.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://www.gimakx.com/): Overview of Gimakx products and B2B manufacturing capabilities.
- [About Us](https://www.gimakx.com/about.html): Gimakx company story, craft, and 20+ years of combined experience in BJJ gear manufacturing.
- [Size Guide](https://www.gimakx.com/bjj-gi.html#size-guide): BJJ Gi sizing from M0 to A5.
- [Request a Quote](https://www.gimakx.com/index.html#rfq): B2B quote request for custom orders.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.gimakx.com/privacy-policy.html): How Gimakx collects and handles customer data.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.gimakx.com/terms.html): B2B order terms, MOQ, lead times, and payment conditions.
